data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Melbourne Metro meeting will be held at Caulfield, and the first of 10 races is a BM74 Handicap over 2000m for 130K. 10. STRAAND DEAL was doing his best work late, fresh over 1500m on the Heath course here just over 3 weeks ago. He has the makings of a good horse over ground, and the extra 500m here is ideal. He drops 4kg, and is the one to beat for ours. 11. MR BANNOCK is progressing steadily through the grades, and he will find this a touch easier than his last start here 3 weeks ago over 2400m, where he ran a game third as the favourite. He won over this trip in his penultimate start, and he is well placed to take this out. 2. BRING FORTH built his form strongly to score an effortless win at Morphettville-Parks over 2294m 3 weeks ago. He cops a tougher gate this time, but he usually holds his form when fit. Each-way. 4. JARETH has been racing well, and he puts himself in a handy spot during the running. He benefits from a 3kg claim, and he should run another honest race. ","runners":[10,11,2,4],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: CAULFIELD-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
